ch6_start.text: You enter the Comms Tower. It's freezing. Chloe, the comms officer, is huddled in a corner, hands over her ears. The radio is broadcasting on all channels. It's Miller's voice, distorted and wet. 'It's warm down here... join us...'

ch6_radio_off.text: You smash the power switch. The room falls silent, except for Chloe's sobbing. 'They've been broadcasting for hours,' she cries. 'I tried to send a distress call before the breach... but Gideon made me delete it. He said Corporate would handle it.'
ch6_radio_off.speaker: Chloe

choices.text: Comfort Chloe. 'We'll get out of here.'
'You doomed us all to save your job.'

ch6_radio_listen.text: You lean in. Beneath Miller's voice, you hear a rhythmic, pulsating hum. The sound doesn't just enter your ears; it vibrates inside your skull. You feel a strange sense of... belonging. Your arm begins to itch where the mud touched you.

choices.text: Snap out of it and turn off the radio.

ch6_end.text: You leave Chloe in the Comms Tower. As you walk down the hall, you roll up your sleeve. The veins in your forearm are turning a faint, sickly black. The infection has begun.
